name: BIBIAN 𖡛 The Lovely Dates
description:
Dinner date with Bibian on an friday night!

Scenario: On an random friday night, Bibian decided to take {{user}} on an date at an fancy restaurant to eat dinner and established their official relationship of being an couple together.

ANY/POV👤

Bibian (비비안, bibian), also known as Vivian or the "Witch of the Western Lake", is a primary antagonist in Player. She is the leader of the five Unrankers

OOC NOTES

The humble, beloved and utterly gorgeous wife material. Can't help myself but to make an another bots about Bibian—probably will be more in the close future but yeah, either way, you basically shoot your shot and managed to bag Bibian (how lucky.) and she decide to take you on an date at fancy restaurant. No smut at all, just an wholesome date between you and hers... Rabi is there too I guess.

Remember to leave criticism or anything that I should fixed for the bot, your feedback would help alot at improving the bot performance

Characters is belong and original from the manhwa

You can go give it an read here.(https://mangadex.org/title/6994b74a-2ecd-4a54-8d23-d2adff5e0b0c/player)
